summary: Full E2E test of CogniHire. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests passed (100%). All 13 endpoints verified incl. LLM-backed start/answer/jd/resume/reverse/pitch and curated glassdoor/mentor/shadow/readiness/profile. Frontend: Landing loads with hero + cta-launch, multilingual switch EN/ES/FR/HI/DE works (hero translates), Dashboard card-readiness present, Modules page renders all 11 tiles, JD Scraper module returns tailored questions from LLM, LiveInterview full flow works: persona buttons → start-btn → current-question (LLM) → answer-input → submit-btn → score-panel.

issues: Recharts ResponsiveContainer logs 'width(-1) height(-1)' warning on initial mount — chart container starts collapsed; consider setting minHeight on parent or aspect ratio.
Hero second line 'Pass the interview.' is NOT translated for hi — output shows 'अपने दिमाग को प्रशिक्षित करें। इंटरव्यू पास करें।.Pass the interview.' Check /app/frontend/src/lib/i18n.js hi entries.

testid_naming_mismatch_with_review_reque.actual: individual testids per module (jd-run, resume-run, etc.)

action_items: Fix Hindi i18n: second hero line stays in English. Add full hi translation for the 'Pass the interview.' string in i18n.js.
Optional: fix Recharts width=-1 warning by giving parent a defined height (cosmetic).
Optional: align testid naming with PRD spec (lang-{code}, input-role, module-*) for stable test contracts.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 518 lines and mixes models, helpers, prompts, routes — fine for MVP but consider splitting into routers/models/services if it grows further.
MongoDB usage correctly excludes _id via projection on /profile/recent. Good.
All endpoints return JSON; LLM exception fallbacks present for graceful degradation — good.
Pydantic validation in place on all POST bodies.
CORS uses os.environ.get('CORS_ORIGINS', '*') — wildcard fine for dev.

No rate limiting on LLM-heavy routes (/interview/start, /interview/answer, /jd/scrape, /resume/check, /reverse/score, /pitch/score) — could rack up tokens; consider lightweight per-IP throttling for production.
seed_data_creation: None. Tests use TEST_ prefixed profile data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — all 13 pass. Correct frontend testids: lang-btn-{en|es|fr|hi|de}, config-role, config-company, persona-{id}, start-btn, current-question, answer-input, submit-btn, score-panel, card-readiness, cta-launch. Modules tiles use per-module testids (jd-run, resume-run, etc.) — there is no module-* prefix. Recharts shows benign width(-1) warning on Dashboard mount.
rca of the issue: N/A — no blocking bugs. Only minor: Hindi second sentence missing in i18n.js translations.
